summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Website Editor (Wife To Be CMS). 16/16 pytest cases passed and end-to-end UI flow (login, dashboard, editor iframe, preview, publish) works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~420 lines — acceptable for MVP but could be split into routers (auth/sites/pages/publish) as it grows.

CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True — browsers reject wildcard+credentials in strict mode. In preview it works because both frontend and backend share the same origin, but for a production CORS-based flow this should be a specific origin list. Not blocking for MVP.
No brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook mentions 5-attempt lockout). Currently unlimited attempts allowed — flag for hardening.
seed_admin only creates the admin if missing; if password changes in .env after first boot, it will NOT be updated. For MVP acceptable but note for future.
JWT cookie uses secure=False — required for preview http-like context but should be True in production over HTTPS.

render_page uses BeautifulSoup(r['value'], 'lxml') on text replace which can wrap fragments in <html><body> — currently works because .decode_contents strips outer body, but subtle. Consider using 'html.parser' with a wrapper for safety.
seed_data_creation: Test created one editor user (TEST_editor_<ts>@example.com) for RBAC test; left in DB (idempotent-safe).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and cover auth, sites/pages, region update, media upload, SEO preservation, preview clean-output, root-file preservation (robots/llms/sitemap), publish-without-SFTP (returns published=false with backup+message — this is EXPECTED per PRD), editor iframe html + auth, RBAC (editor gets 403 on /api/users). Frontend E2E verified via Playwright: login (wrong+correct), 14 page cards, page-about editor opens with iframe containing 48 data-eid regions and 4 stylesheets (fully-styled), SEO title input populated, back to dashboard, Preview opens dist/index.html in a new tab, Publish click triggers flow. All data-testids from App.js are correctly wired.
verified_features: 14 pages listed (all expected slugs present incl. 404)
Editor iframe loads fully-styled page with data-eid editable regions (editor-mode only)
Image upload returns assets/uploads/... URL and PUT region persists
SEO title update persists; metas & jsonld arrays remain non-empty (preserved)
Preview builds dist with 14 pages, HTML has NO data-eid attributes (clean output)
Publish without SFTP: published=false, backup path returned, message mentions SFTP not configured
RBAC: editor login → POST /api/users returns 403; GET /api/users also 403
Root files robots.txt, llms.txt, llms-full.txt, sitemap.xml served by /api/dist
